extraction.one_line_summary: GALLOPIN Tony won from breakaway with solo attack inside 2km on rolling false-flat finish, gaining 30 seconds on peloton split by late crash
tactical_patterns: Narrow roads created selection before finish; riders unable to fit through compression points created positioning gaps exploitable on mild gradients.
HARADA bridging solo from peloton to breakaway inside 2km nearly successful, revealing weakness in break's cohesion on gradual approaches.
Late crash at narrow section caught KWIATKOWSKI and disrupted peloton chase, suggesting green jersey positioning priorities cost him defensive awareness.

rider_signals.GALLOPIN Tony: positive: attacked breakaway companions with 2km remaining on subtle gradient, showing strength on rolling false-flat terrain after Tour illness recovery
rider_signals.HARADA: positive: nearly bridged solo from peloton to winning break inside 2km, exceptional power on gradual finishing circuits
rider_signals.KWIATKOWSKI Michal: negative: crashed late while defending green jersey, poor positioning awareness in critical narrow sections despite jersey obligations
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: neutral: retained points lead finishing 30 seconds back, fought for front position but unable to contest from peloton
rider_signals.PREIDLER Georg: positive: cited doing preparatory positioning work for teammate in break, effective domestique role on rolling stages
